MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Darren Lee appearing in propria persona as a minor shareholder (no phone number), opposing the motion

RULING:
Upon request of Shareholder Lee, the Court vacated its tentative ruling and continued PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.'S MOTION TO AMEND/MODIFY JUDGMENT to December 3, 2003, defendant's opposition due on or before November 14, 2003. (301/JLW/JU) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
